goal: Responsible for transferring money internally (same member's accounts or to a different member's accounts in same bank), externally (domestic or international institution between different banks) or via ACH transfer (from external institution to own/current institution).

data.name: get full account number

member_id.name: member_id
member_id.description: member ID is the customer unique identifier, it is a 10-digit number.
member_id.title: member ID is the customer unique identifier, it is a 10-digit number.

selected_destin_account_number.name: selected_destin_account_number
selected_destin_account_number.description: selected destination account number, this variable represents the account number that the customer selects to operate on funds transfer, which is usually contains at least four digits.
selected_destin_account_number.title: selected destination account number, this variable represents the account number that the customer selects to operate on funds transfer, which is usually contains at least four digits.

selected_origin_account_number.name: selected_origin_account_number
selected_origin_account_number.description: selected original account number, this variable represents the account number that the customer selects to operate on funds transfer, which is usually contains at least four digits.
selected_origin_account_number.title: selected original account number, this variable represents the account number that the customer selects to operate on funds transfer, which is usually contains at least four digits.

workflow_status.name: workflow_status
workflow_status.description: This variable represents the execution result of the skill workflow.
workflow_status.title: This variable represents the execution result of the skill workflow.

contact_id.name: contact_id
contact_id.description: This variable represents the contact ID of the customer, which is of numeric type and is usually the same as the member ID.
contact_id.title: This variable represents the contact ID of the customer, which is of numeric type and is usually the same as the member ID.

transaction_post_date.name: transaction_post_date
transaction_post_date.description: The date on which funds are taken or added to an account.
transaction_post_date.title: The date on which funds are taken or added to an account.

data.name: get full account number

recipient_first_last_name.name: recipient_first_last_name
recipient_first_last_name.description: The full name of the person to whom the customer wants to make the transfer.
recipient_first_last_name.title: The full name of the person to whom the customer wants to make the transfer.

transfer_direction.description:
transfer money direction,
Allowed values:

OUT(funds flowing out of this bank)
transfer_direction.title:
